message:
feat(connectors): implement handle_self_check for mattermost, plaid, and qdrant

Add self-check diagnostic handlers to three connectors:

- mattermost: implement handle_doctor(), handle_self_check(), and
  handle_simulate() with full message dispatcher wiring and 3 unit tests
- plaid: implement handle_self_check() with dispatcher wiring; refactor
  integration test helpers (generate_valid_token, setup_handshake) to
  use capability_for_operation() for cleaner capability mapping
- qdrant: implement handle_self_check() with dispatcher wiring

These handlers enable the fcp doctor/self-check infrastructure to
validate connector health at runtime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -84,7 +84,10 @@ async fn handle_message(connector: &mut MattermostConnector, message: &str) -> s
         "configure" => connector.handle_configure(params).await,
         "handshake" => connector.handle_handshake(params),
         "health" => connector.handle_health().await,
+        "doctor" => connector.handle_doctor().await,
+        "self_check" => connector.handle_self_check().await,
         "introspect" => connector.handle_introspect(),
+        "simulate" => connector.handle_simulate(params).await,
         "subscribe" => connector.handle_subscribe(params).await,
         "invoke" => connector.handle_invoke(params).await,
         "shutdown" => connector.handle_shutdown(params).await,
